title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions:
Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions!
